title: Mossel Bay welcomes 345 cruise ship guests
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  The Hapag-Lloyd Cruises company’s stunning MS Europa cruise ship was spotted in Mossel Bay this morning, 5 February.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Hapag-Lloyd Cruises company’s stunning MS Europa cruise ship was spotted in Mossel Bay this morning, 5 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"At 651ft (198.6m), complete with 10 decks and 204 suites, the ship arrived in the Mossel Bay Port at 07:00 and its expected time of departure is at 18:00 this evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An estimated 345 guests are on board the Europa, and they are expected to roam around Mossel Bay during the course of the day.","html":"An estimated 345 guests are on board the Europa, and they are expected to roam around Mossel Bay during the course of the day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Arrival and departure times are dependent on the weather and ocean swells, but are ultimately up to the ship’s captain.","html":"Arrival and departure times are dependent on the weather and ocean swells, but are ultimately up to the ship’s captain."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Although the Europa is smaller than other cruise ships, it can carry up to 400 guests and offers five restaurants, a variety of entertainment, fitness and wellness facilities and activities for families, including pool parties, arts and crafts and excursions crafted especially for children.","html":"Although the Europa is smaller than other cruise ships, it can carry up to 400 guests and offers five restaurants, a variety of entertainment, fitness and wellness facilities and activities for families, including pool parties, arts and crafts and excursions crafted especially for children."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"According to the Hapag-Lloyd Cruises’ website, because of its small size, the MS Europa is able to dock at more ports around the world than the bigger cruise ships."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay Tourism welcomed the guests at a hospitality desk inside the Port of Mossel Bay’s Cruise Reception Facility.","html":"Mossel Bay Tourism welcomed the guests at a hospitality desk inside the Port of Mossel Bay’s Cruise Reception Facility."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This facility was launched in November at the beginning of Mossel Bay’s 2025/26 cruise season, which will continue until May.","html":"This facility was launched in November at the beginning of Mossel Bay’s 2025/26 cruise season, which will continue until May."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A R22m investment of the Transnet National Port of Authority (TNPA), this reception facility is a designated space for the passengers of luxury cruise ships when they dock in Mossel Bay.","html":"A R22m investment of the Transnet National Port of Authority (TNPA), this reception facility is a designated space for the passengers of luxury cruise ships when they dock in Mossel Bay."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
